source_clause_title: 1.1 Contract Definitions.  The following terms, when used herein with initial

entities.name: City of San Jose
entities.legal_role: The Buyer is the contracting party obligated to purchase energy and comply with the terms of the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: “Buyer” means City of San Jose, a California municipality.

entities.name: Seller
entities.legal_role: The Seller is the contracting party obligated to deliver Facility Energy and comply with the terms of the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: “Seller” has the meaning set forth on the Cover Sheet.

entities.name: Agreement
entities.legal_role: The Agreement is the primary contract document governing the rights and obligations of the Parties.
entities.evidence_quote: “Agreement” has the meaning set forth in the Preamble and includes any Exhibits, schedules and any written supplements hereto, the Cover Sheet, and any designated collateral, credit support or similar arrangement between the Parties.

entities.name: Generating Facility
entities.legal_role: The physical solar photovoltaic facility that produces electrical energy to be delivered under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: “Generating Facility” means the solar photovoltaic generating facility described on the Cover Sheet and in Exhibit A, located at the Site and including mechanical equipment and associated facilities and equipment required to deliver (i) PV Energy to the Delivery Point, and (ii) Charging Energy to the Storage Facility; provided, that the “Generating Facility” does not include the Storage Facility or the Shared Facilities.

entities.name: Storage Facility
entities.legal_role: The energy storage facility integrated with the Generating Facility, capable of delivering Discharging Energy to the Delivery Point.
entities.evidence_quote: “Storage Facility” means, following Seller’s exercise of its option to add an integrated energy storage facility pursuant to Section 2.3, the energy storage facility described in Exhibit A (including the operational requirements of the energy storage facility), located at the Site and including mechanical equipment and associated facilities and equipment required to deliver Discharging Energy to the Delivery Point (but excluding any Shared Facilities), and as such storage facility may be expanded or otherwise modified from time to time.

entities.name: Facility Energy
entities.legal_role: The electrical energy product delivered by the Facility, consisting of PV Energy and Discharging Energy net of losses and station use, measured for invoicing and compliance.
entities.evidence_quote: “Facility Energy” means the sum of PV Energy and Discharging Energy, net of Electrical Losses and Station Use, as measured by the Facility Meter...

entities.name: PV Energy
entities.legal_role: The as-available electrical energy produced by the Generating Facility delivered directly to the Delivery Point, excluding Discharging Energy.
entities.evidence_quote: “PV Energy” means the as-available Energy produced by the Generating Facility that is delivered directly to the Delivery Point and is not Discharging Energy.

entities.name: Discharging Energy
entities.legal_role: The electrical energy delivered to the Delivery Point from the Storage Facility, net of Electrical Losses, originally delivered as Charging Energy.
entities.evidence_quote: “Discharging Energy” means all Energy delivered to the Delivery Point from the Storage Facility, net of the Electrical Losses, as measured at the Storage Facility Metering Points by the Storage Facility Meter. For the avoidance of doubt, all Discharging Energy will have originally been delivered to the Storage Facility as Charging Energy.

entities.name: Delivery Point
entities.legal_role: The physical point at which Facility Energy is delivered and measured for purposes of the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: “Delivery Point” has the meaning set forth in Exhibit A.

entities.name: Cover Sheet
entities.legal_role: The contract attachment that sets forth key terms including Contract Price, Contract Term, and other defined terms.
entities.evidence_quote: “Cover Sheet” means the cover sheet to this Agreement, which is incorporated into this Agreement.

entities.name: Guarantor
entities.legal_role: A Person providing a Guaranty for the benefit of Buyer, meeting specified creditworthiness and other criteria.
entities.evidence_quote: “Guarantor” means, with respect to Seller, a Person that is reasonably acceptable to Buyer or any Person that ... executes and delivers a Guaranty for the benefit of Buyer.

entities.name: Guaranty
entities.legal_role: A guaranty instrument provided by a Guarantor for the benefit of Buyer to secure Seller’s obligations.
entities.evidence_quote: “Guaranty” means a guaranty from a Guarantor provided for the benefit of Buyer substantially in the form attached as Exhibit L.

entities.name: Interconnection Agreement
entities.legal_role: The agreement governing the interconnection of the Facility with the Transmission System and the construction, operation, and maintenance of Interconnection Facilities.
entities.evidence_quote: “Interconnection Agreement” means the interconnection agreement entered into by Seller pursuant to which the Facility will be interconnected with the Transmission System...

entities.name: Interconnection Facilities
entities.legal_role: The facilities, control and protective devices, and metering facilities required to connect the Facility with the Transmission System under the Interconnection Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: “Interconnection Facilities” means the interconnection facilities, control and protective devices and metering facilities required to connect the Facility with the Transmission System in accordance with the Interconnection Agreement.

entities.name: California Independent System Operator Corporation
entities.legal_role: The regulatory and market operator responsible for the CAISO Tariff and overseeing the electric grid operations relevant to the Facility.
entities.evidence_quote: “CAISO” means the California Independent System Operator Corporation.

entities.name: CAISO Tariff
entities.legal_role: The governing tariff, business practice manuals, and operating procedures regulating CAISO market operations and the Facility’s participation.
entities.evidence_quote: “CAISO Tariff” means the California Independent System Operator Corporation Agreement and Tariff, Business Practice Manuals (BPMs), and Operating Procedures...

entities.name: Business Day
entities.legal_role: Defines the days and hours during which notices, payments, or actions must be performed under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: “Business Day” means any day except a Saturday, Sunday, or a Federal Reserve Bank holiday in California. A Business Day begins at 8:00 a.m. and ends at 5:00 p.m. Pacific Prevailing Time (PPT) for the Party sending a Notice, or payment, or performing a specified action.

entities.name: Force Majeure Event
entities.legal_role: An event excusing performance under the Agreement as defined in Section 10.1.
entities.evidence_quote: “Force Majeure Event” has the meaning set forth in Section 10.1.

entities.name: Event of Default
entities.legal_role: A breach event by a Party that triggers remedies under the Agreement as defined in Section 11.1.
entities.evidence_quote: “Event of Default” has the meaning set forth in Section 11.1.

entities.name: Non-Defaulting Party
entities.legal_role: The Party not in default entitled to remedies and damages upon an Event of Default as defined in Section 11.2.
entities.evidence_quote: “Non-Defaulting Party” has the meaning set forth in Section 11.2.

entities.name: Contract Term
entities.legal_role: The period during which the Agreement is effective as set forth in Section 2.1.
entities.evidence_quote: “Contract Term” has the meaning set forth in Section 2.1.

entities.name: Commercial Operation Date
entities.legal_role: The date on which the Facility achieves commercial operation as defined in Exhibit B.
entities.evidence_quote: “Commercial Operation Date” has the meaning set forth in Exhibit B.

entities.name: Development Security
entities.legal_role: A financial security in cash or Letter of Credit form securing development obligations, amount set forth on the Cover Sheet.
entities.evidence_quote: “Development Security” means (i) cash or (ii) a Letter of Credit in the amount set forth on the Cover Sheet.

entities.name: CAISO Approved Meter
entities.legal_role: Metering equipment approved by CAISO for real-time monitoring and reporting of Facility Energy delivered to the Delivery Point.
entities.evidence_quote: “CAISO Approved Meter” means a CAISO approved revenue quality meter or meters, CAISO approved data processing gateway or remote intelligence gateway, telemetering equipment and data acquisition services sufficient for monitoring, recording and reporting, in real time, all Facility Energy delivered to the Delivery Point.

entities.name: Party or Parties
entities.legal_role: The entities entering into the Agreement, including Buyer and Seller.
entities.evidence_quote: “Party” or “Parties” has the meaning set forth in the Preamble.

entities.name: Affiliate
entities.legal_role: An entity controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a designated Person, relevant for transfer and credit considerations.
entities.evidence_quote: “Affiliate” means, with respect to any Person, each Person that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with such designated Person...

entities.name: Permitted Transferee
entities.legal_role: An entity meeting specified financial and operational experience criteria eligible to receive assignment or transfer of rights under the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: “Permitted Transferee” means any entity that satisfies, or is controlled by another Person that satisfies, the following requirements: (a) A tangible net worth of not less than one hundred fifty million dollars... (b) At least two (2) years of experience in the ownership and operations of power generation facilities similar to the Generating Facility...

entities.name: Curtailment Order
entities.legal_role: An order from CAISO or Participating Transmission Owner requiring reduction of Facility Energy deliveries for system reliability or maintenance reasons.
entities.evidence_quote: “Curtailment Order” means any of the following: (a) CAISO orders... (b) a curtailment ordered by the Participating Transmission Owner... (c) a curtailment ordered by CAISO or the Participating Transmission Owner due to scheduled or unscheduled maintenance... (d) a curtailment in accordance with Seller’s obligations under its Interconnection Agreement...

entities.name: Curtailment Period
entities.legal_role: The time period during which generation is reduced pursuant to a Curtailment Order, including ramp down and ramp up times.
entities.evidence_quote: “Curtailment Period” means the period of time, as measured using current Settlement Intervals, during which generation from the Generating Facility is reduced pursuant to a Curtailment Order; provided that the Curtailment Period shall be inclusive of the time required for the Generating Facility to ramp down and ramp up.

entities.name: CAISO Operating Order
entities.legal_role: An operating order defined in the CAISO Tariff that may require curtailment of Facility Energy.
entities.evidence_quote: “CAISO Operating Order” means the “operating order” defined in Section 37.2.1.1 of the CAISO Tariff.

entities.name: DA LMP
entities.legal_role: The Locational Marginal Price applicable to the Delivery Point in the CAISO Day-Ahead Market, relevant for pricing and curtailment decisions.
entities.evidence_quote: “DA LMP” means the LMP applicable to the Delivery Point in the CAISO Day-Ahead Market.

entities.name: Contract Price
entities.legal_role: The price payable under the Agreement for the Product, as set forth on the Cover Sheet.
entities.evidence_quote: “Contract Price” has the meaning set forth on the Cover Sheet.

entities.name: Commercial Operation
entities.legal_role: The status of the Facility when it is ready and capable of commercial energy production as defined in Exhibit B.
entities.evidence_quote: “Commercial Operation” has the meaning set forth in Exhibit B.

entities.name: Commercial Operation Delay Damages
entities.legal_role: A liquidated damages amount payable for delay in achieving Commercial Operation, calculated as Development Security divided by sixty (60).
entities.evidence_quote: “Commercial Operation Delay Damages” means an amount equal to the Development Security amount required hereunder, divided by sixty (60).

entities.name: Facility Meter
entities.legal_role: The CAISO Approved Meter that measures all Facility Energy at the Delivery Point for invoicing and compliance.
entities.evidence_quote: “Facility Meter” means the CAISO Approved Meter that will measure all Facility Energy.

entities.name: Lender
entities.legal_role: Any Person providing debt or equity financing or refinancing for the Facility, including trustees or agents acting on their behalf.
entities.evidence_quote: “Lender” means, collectively, any Person (i) providing senior or subordinated construction, interim, back leverage or long-term debt, equity or tax equity financing or refinancing for or in connection with the development, construction, purchase, installation or operation of the Facility...

entities.name: Site
entities.legal_role: The real property on which the Facility is or will be located, as described in Exhibit A.
entities.evidence_quote: “Site” means the real property on which the Facility is or will be located, as further described in Exhibit A...

entities.name: Site Control
entities.legal_role: The legal right of Seller or its Affiliate to own, lease, or hold easements or options for the Site during the Contract Term.
entities.evidence_quote: “Site Control” means that, for the Contract Term, Seller (or, prior to the Delivery Term, its Affiliate): (a) owns or has the option to purchase the Site; (b) is the lessee or has the option to lease the Site; or (c) is the holder of an easement or an option for an easement...

entities.name: Green Attributes
entities.legal_role: Environmental credits and benefits attributable to generation from the Facility, including Renewable Energy Credits and avoided emissions.
entities.evidence_quote: “Green Attributes” means any and all credits, benefits, emissions reductions, offsets, and allowances, howsoever entitled, attributable to the generation from the Facility and its displacement of conventional energy generation...

entities.name: Resource Adequacy Benefits
entities.legal_role: Rights and privileges attached to the Facility that satisfy resource adequacy obligations under applicable rulings and regulations.
entities.evidence_quote: “Resource Adequacy Benefits” means the rights and privileges attached to the Facility that satisfy any entity’s resource adequacy obligations, as those obligations are set forth in any Resource Adequacy Rulings...

entities.name: Participating Transmission Owner
entities.legal_role: Entity owning or operating transmission or distribution lines where the Facility is interconnected, with authority to issue curtailment orders.
entities.evidence_quote: “Participating Transmission Owner” or “PTO” means an entity that owns, operates and maintains transmission or distribution lines and associated facilities or has entitlements to use certain transmission or distribution lines and associated facilities where the Facility is interconnected.

relationships.relationship_type: Ownership and Operation of Generating Facility
relationships.legal_significance: Seller owns and operates the Generating Facility, which is the source of energy delivery obligations under the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Generating Facility” means the solar photovoltaic generating facility described on the Cover Sheet and in Exhibit A, located at the Site...

relationships.legal_significance: Seller has the option to add an integrated energy storage facility to the Generating Facility pursuant to Section 2.3, expanding its delivery obligations.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Storage Facility” means, following Seller’s exercise of its option to add an integrated energy storage facility pursuant to Section 2.3...

relationships.legal_significance: Facility Energy must be delivered to and measured at the Delivery Point for contractual performance and invoicing.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Facility Energy” means the sum of PV Energy and Discharging Energy, net of Electrical Losses and Station Use, as measured by the Facility Meter...

relationships.legal_significance: The CAISO Approved Meter is the instrument used to measure Facility Energy delivered to the Delivery Point, critical for billing and compliance.
relationships.evidence_quote: “CAISO Approved Meter” means a CAISO approved revenue quality meter or meters... sufficient for monitoring, recording and reporting, in real time, all Facility Energy delivered to the Delivery Point.

relationships.legal_significance: The Guarantor provides a Guaranty to secure Seller’s obligations for the benefit of Buyer.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Guarantor” ... executes and delivers a Guaranty for the benefit of Buyer.

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer is the beneficiary of the Guaranty, providing financial assurance against Seller’s default.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Guaranty” means a guaranty from a Guarantor provided for the benefit of Buyer...

relationships.legal_significance: The Interconnection Agreement governs the connection of the Generating Facility to the Transmission System, enabling energy delivery.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Interconnection Agreement” means the interconnection agreement entered into by Seller pursuant to which the Facility will be interconnected with the Transmission System...

relationships.legal_significance: Interconnection Facilities are constructed, operated, and maintained under the Interconnection Agreement to connect the Facility to the grid.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Interconnection Facilities” means the interconnection facilities... required to connect the Facility with the Transmission System in accordance with the Interconnection Agreement.

relationships.legal_significance: A Curtailment Order initiates a Curtailment Period during which Facility generation is reduced, affecting energy delivery obligations.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Curtailment Period” means the period of time... during which generation from the Generating Facility is reduced pursuant to a Curtailment Order...

relationships.legal_significance: CAISO has authority to issue Curtailment Orders to maintain electric system integrity, impacting Facility operations.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Curtailment Order” means any of the following: (a) CAISO orders, directs, alerts, or provides notice to a Party...

relationships.legal_significance: The Participating Transmission Owner may order curtailments for system reliability or maintenance, affecting Facility energy delivery.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Curtailment Order” means any of the following: (b) a curtailment ordered by the Participating Transmission Owner...

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer is obligated to pay the Contract Price for the Product delivered under the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Contract Price” has the meaning set forth on the Cover Sheet.

relationships.legal_significance: Seller is obligated to deliver the Product, including PV Energy, capacity, ancillary services, and attributes, to Buyer under the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Product” means the PV Energy, Generating Facility capacity, Generating Facility ancillary services, and all products, services and/or attributes similar to the foregoing which are or can be produced by or associated with the Generating Facility...

relationships.legal_significance: Affiliates of Seller may be involved in financing, ownership, or operational aspects relevant to the Agreement.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Affiliate” means, with respect to any Person, each Person that directly or indirectly controls, is controlled by, or is under common control with such designated Person.

relationships.legal_significance: Lenders provide financing or refinancing to Seller or its Affiliates for development, construction, or operation of the Facility.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Lender” means, collectively, any Person... providing senior or subordinated construction, interim, back leverage or long-term debt, equity or tax equity financing or refinancing for or in connection with the development, construction, purchase, installation or operation of the Facility...

relationships.legal_significance: Seller or its Affiliate must have legal control over the Site for the Contract Term to ensure Facility development and operation.
relationships.evidence_quote: “Site Control” means that, for the Contract Term, Seller (or, prior to the Delivery Term, its Affiliate): (a) owns or has the option to purchase the Site; (b) is the lessee or has the option to lease the Site; or (c) is the holder of an easement or an option for an easement...

relationships.legal_significance: CAISO administers the CAISO Tariff, which governs market rules and operations applicable to the Facility.
relationships.evidence_quote: “CAISO Tariff” means the California Independent System Operator Corporation Agreement and Tariff... as approved by FERC.

relationships.legal_significance: The CAISO Tariff is subject to approval by the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission, ensuring regulatory compliance.
relationships.evidence_quote: “CAISO Tariff” ... to the extent subject to FERC approval, as approved by FERC.

extractor_notes: This clause is a comprehensive definitions section from a power purchase agreement, defining numerous key legal terms, parties, assets, and regulatory references. Entities and relationships are primarily foundational for understanding the contract's operational, financial, and regulatory framework. No inferred relationships beyond explicit definitions were extracted.

source_clause_title: 14.2 Collateral Assignment.  Subject to the provisions of this Section 14.2, Seller has

entities.entity_type: Obligor under Agreement and Assignor of Collateral
entities.name: Seller
entities.legal_role: Seller is the party who has the right to assign the Agreement as collateral and whose defaults trigger certain rights and obligations under the Collateral Assignment Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller has the right to assign this Agreement as collateral for any financing or refinancing of the Facility.

entities.entity_type: Obligee under Agreement and Consent Party
entities.name: Buyer
entities.legal_role: Buyer is the counterparty to the Agreement who must consent to the Collateral Assignment Agreement and has rights to receive notices, reports, and approve amendments or termination.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment of this Agreement

entities.entity_type: Secured Party and Assignee of Collateral
entities.name: Lender
entities.legal_role: Lender is the party receiving the collateral assignment, with rights to cure Events of Default, consent to amendments and termination, assume Seller’s obligations upon possession, and sell or transfer the Facility subject to conditions.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment of this Agreement

entities.name: Collateral Assignment Agreement
entities.legal_role: The agreement among Buyer, Seller, and Lender that governs the collateral assignment of the Agreement and sets forth specific rights and obligations related to Events of Default, cure rights, notices, and assumption of obligations.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment of this Agreement (“Collateral Assignment Agreement”).

entities.name: Event of Default
entities.legal_role: A triggering event under the Agreement that activates notice, cure, and termination rights for Buyer and cure and assumption rights for Lender under the Collateral Assignment Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: Buyer shall give Notice of an Event of Default by Seller to the Person(s) to be specified by Lender in the Collateral Assignment Agreement

entities.entity_type: Cure Period for Event of Default
entities.name: Cure Period
entities.legal_role: The time period during which Seller or Lender may remedy an Event of Default before Buyer may exercise termination rights, including any additional cure periods agreed in the Collateral Assignment Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: Lender must remedy or cure the Event of Default within the cure period under this Agreement and any additional cure periods agreed in the Collateral Assignment Agreement

entities.entity_type: Facility Subject to Financing and Collateral Assignment
entities.name: Facility
entities.legal_role: The physical or operational asset that is the subject of financing or refinancing and collateral assignment of the Agreement.
entities.evidence_quote: the right to assign this Agreement as collateral for any financing or refinancing of the Facility.

entities.name: Permitted Transferee
entities.legal_role: An entity that meets defined criteria and is eligible to receive the Facility upon sale or transfer by Lender, ensuring Buyer’s contractual and legal protections continue.
entities.evidence_quote: Such sale or transfer may be made only to an entity that (i) meets the definition of Permitted Transferee

entities.name: Replacement Agreement
entities.legal_role: A new agreement with substantially the same terms as the original Agreement that Lender may enter into with Buyer following rejection or termination in Seller’s bankruptcy.
entities.evidence_quote: Lender shall have the right to elect within forty-five (45) days after such rejection or termination, to enter into a replacement agreement with Buyer having substantially the same terms as this Agreement

relationships.legal_significance: Seller’s right to assign the Agreement as collateral enables financing or refinancing secured by the Facility.
relationships.evidence_quote: Seller has the right to assign this Agreement as collateral for any financing or refinancing of the Facility.

relationships.relationship_type: Consent Party to Collateral Assignment Agreement
relationships.legal_significance: Buyer’s consent is required and cannot be unreasonably withheld, ensuring Buyer’s interests are protected in the collateral assignment.
relationships.evidence_quote: The Collateral Assignment Agreement must be in form and substance agreed to by Buyer, Seller and Lender including with respect to the provisions set forth below, with such agreement not to be unreasonably withheld

relationships.relationship_type: Secured Party and Consent Party to Collateral Assignment Agreement
relationships.legal_significance: Lender’s agreement to the Collateral Assignment Agreement governs its rights to cure defaults, consent to amendments, and assume obligations.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer shall in good faith work with Seller and Lender to agree upon a consent to collateral assignment of this Agreement

relationships.relationship_type: Notice Recipient of Event of Default
relationships.legal_significance: Buyer must give notice of Seller’s Event of Default to Lender before exercising termination rights, providing Lender an opportunity to cure.
relationships.evidence_quote: Buyer shall give Notice of an Event of Default by Seller to the Person(s) to be specified by Lender in the Collateral Assignment Agreement, before exercising its right to terminate this Agreement

relationships.relationship_type: Right and Obligation to Cure Event of Default
relationships.legal_significance: Lender may cure an Event of Default on behalf of Seller within specified cure periods to prevent termination by Buyer.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender will have the right to cure an Event of Default on behalf of Seller, only if Lender sends a written notice to Buyer before the later of (i) the expiration of any cure period, and (ii) five (5) Business Days after Lender’s receipt of notice

relationships.relationship_type: Possession or Title Holder of Facility
relationships.legal_significance: If Lender takes possession or title to the Facility, it must assume Seller’s obligations under the Agreement, ensuring continuity of contractual performance.
relationships.evidence_quote: If Lender, directly or indirectly, takes possession of, or title to the Facility ... Lender must assume all of Seller’s obligations arising under this Agreement

relationships.relationship_type: Condition to Sale or Transfer of Facility
relationships.legal_significance: Lender must ensure any transferee of the Facility is a Permitted Transferee, protecting Buyer’s contractual rights and compliance with applicable law.
relationships.evidence_quote: Such sale or transfer may be made only to an entity that (i) meets the definition of Permitted Transferee and (ii) is an entity that Buyer is permitted to contract with under applicable Law

relationships.relationship_type: Right to Enter Replacement Agreement Post-Bankruptcy
relationships.legal_significance: Lender may elect to enter into a replacement agreement with Buyer after rejection or termination in Seller’s bankruptcy, preserving the contractual relationship.
relationships.evidence_quote: Lender shall have the right to elect within forty-five (45) days after such rejection or termination, to enter into a replacement agreement with Buyer having substantially the same terms as this Agreement

relationships.legal_significance: Buyer must enter into the replacement agreement with Lender or its designee upon Lender’s election, ensuring continuity of the Agreement’s terms.
relationships.evidence_quote: promptly after Lender’s written request, Buyer must enter into such replacement agreement with Lender or Lender’s designee

extractor_notes: This clause establishes a detailed framework for collateral assignment of the Agreement, including cure rights, notice obligations, assumption of obligations by Lender upon possession or title transfer, and protections for Buyer through consent and approval rights. The relationships between Seller, Buyer, and Lender are carefully balanced to protect financing interests while preserving Buyer’s contractual protections.

source_clause_title: 2.3 Development; Construction; Progress Reports.  Within fifteen (15) days after

entities.name: Seller
entities.legal_role: The party responsible for designing, constructing, and delivering the Facility and providing progress reports and documentation to the Buyer.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller shall provide to Buyer a Progress Report ... Seller is solely responsible for the design and construction of the Facility...

entities.name: Buyer
entities.legal_role: The party entitled to receive progress reports, documentation, and notices from the Seller regarding the Facility's development and construction.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller shall provide to Buyer a Progress Report ... Seller shall also provide Buyer with any reasonable requested documentation...

entities.name: Progress Report
entities.legal_role: A periodic report that Seller must provide to Buyer detailing construction progress, serving as a key monitoring and communication tool.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller shall provide to Buyer a Progress Report ... The form of the Progress Report is set forth in Exhibit E.

entities.name: Exhibit E
entities.legal_role: The contractual attachment that specifies the form and content of the Progress Report to be provided by Seller to Buyer.
entities.evidence_quote: The form of the Progress Report is set forth in Exhibit E.

entities.name: Milestones
entities.legal_role: Specific development or construction targets whose achievement triggers Seller's obligation to provide related documentation upon Buyer's request.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller shall also provide Buyer with any reasonable requested documentation ... directly related to the achievement of Milestones...

entities.name: Facility
entities.legal_role: The physical project asset that Seller is obligated to design, construct, and deliver under the contract.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller is solely responsible for the design and construction of the Facility...

entities.name: Site
entities.legal_role: The physical location of the Facility, for which Seller is responsible for selection and design.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller is solely responsible for ... including the location of the Site...

entities.name: Permits and Approvals
entities.legal_role: All governmental or regulatory permissions required to build the Facility, which Seller must obtain.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller is solely responsible for ... obtaining all permits and approvals to build the Facility...

entities.name: Equipment
entities.legal_role: The physical components comprising the Facility, which Seller must select and procure.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller is solely responsible for ... the selection and procurement of the equipment comprising the Facility.

entities.entity_type: Optional Project Component - Integrated Energy Storage Facility
entities.name: Storage Facility
entities.legal_role: An optional energy storage component that Seller may incorporate into the Facility at its sole discretion.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller has the right, but not the obligation, in its sole discretion, to incorporate an integrated energy storage facility into the Facility.

entities.name: Notice of Storage Facility Addition
entities.legal_role: Seller's obligation to notify Buyer with revised exhibits before commencing construction on the Storage Facility.
entities.evidence_quote: Prior to commencing construction on the Storage Facility, Seller will provide notice to Buyer with a revised Exhibit A and a revised Exhibit P...

entities.name: Exhibit A
entities.legal_role: Contractual attachment describing the Facility, which must be revised to reflect the addition of the Storage Facility.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller will provide notice to Buyer with a revised Exhibit A ... which will automatically supersede the prior version of Exhibit A.

entities.name: Exhibit P
entities.legal_role: Contractual attachment describing metering arrangements, which must be revised to reflect the Storage Facility Meter.
entities.evidence_quote: Seller will provide notice to Buyer with a revised Exhibit P ... which will automatically supersede the prior version of Exhibit P.

entities.name: Storage Facility Meter
entities.legal_role: Metering equipment associated with the Storage Facility, reflected in revised Exhibit P.
entities.evidence_quote: a revised Exhibit P reflecting the addition of the Storage Facility and the Storage Facility Meter...

relationships.legal_significance: Seller must provide Progress Reports and requested documentation to Buyer, enabling Buyer to monitor construction progress and milestone achievement.
relationships.evidence_quote: Seller shall provide to Buyer a Progress Report ... Seller shall also provide Buyer with any reasonable requested documentation...

relationships.legal_significance: The Progress Report must conform to the form set forth in Exhibit E, ensuring standardized reporting.
relationships.evidence_quote: The form of the Progress Report is set forth in Exhibit E.

relationships.legal_significance: Seller is solely responsible for the design and construction of the Facility, defining the scope of Seller's obligations.
relationships.evidence_quote: Seller is solely responsible for the design and construction of the Facility...

relationships.legal_significance: Seller's responsibility includes selecting the Site location, which affects project feasibility and compliance.
